title: The Middle Ages
description: Survive, build, and explore in a Minecraft world reborn for the medieval age!
body:
Bring Minecraft back to the age of swords, castles, and legends.

This pack transforms your world into a medieval survival experience without bloating it with tech or futuristic mods. Explore sprawling dungeons, ride mythical creatures, and build immersive towns with new blocks and decorations — all while keeping the game lightweight and smooth.

🏰 Features

Epic Exploration – Discover new structures, dungeons, and castles with When Dungeons Arise and YUNG’s Better series.

Medieval Combat – Gear up with new weapons, armor, and bosses to challenge your survival skills.

Mythical Companions – Tame and ride fantasy creatures with Mythic Mounts.

Immersive Building – Add rustic decorations and medieval architecture with Supplementaries, Decorative Blocks, and more.

Enhanced Survival – Weathered environments, new mobs, and RPG-style gameplay.

Performance Friendly – Optimized with Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight for smooth gameplay.

🔧 Technical

Minecraft: 1.20.1

Mod Loader: Fabric

Includes Fabric API and Mod Menu for configuration.

🎯 Perfect For

Players who want the feel of medieval fantasy without leaving behind Minecraft’s vanilla charm. Great for survival worlds, roleplay servers, or anyone who loves castles, swords, and adventure.
